description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Mathcad wrapper that runs on pushes to specific branches and tags, on pull requests to those branches, and when called from other workflows. In a single windows-latest job, check out the repository with submodules, copy MathCAD dependencies, configure CMake with specific options, build the CoolPropMathcadWrapper target with multiple cores, and archive the resulting binaries as an artifact named binaries-MathcadPrime.
